justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's preference for "around 3 PM, maybe some other time" by offering slots at 3 PM and 4 PM on subsequent days.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered relevant alternative times when the initial request for "around 3 PM" on the current day was not available, providing three suitable options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and providing suitable options, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.recovery_quality: Recovery quality is not applicable as the agent successfully offered suitable alternatives in the first turn, and the user accepted one of them immediately.
